info.description: Read a self-grading oracle of dated, falsifiable tech predictions, its public track record and calibration, and the underlying discourse-diffusion data. Static, read-only, CORS-open.
info.title: THE SIGNAL Oracle API

get.summary: Discourse state: acceleration pulse, sector indices, fear/greed, fastest movers, and the chasm (mainstream-crossing) watch.

Today's slate of dated tech calls with win conditions, odds and reasoning.
